name: GET /api/v1/announcement/ - pagination field types are valid

    @allure.title("GET /api/v1/announcement/ - pagination field types are valid")
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.NORMAL)
    def test_get_announcement_pagination_field_types(self):
        """
        Purpose: Verify that pagination fields have correct types
        """
        with allure.step("Send GET request"):
            url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/announcement/"
            response = requests.get(url)
            assert response.status_code == 200
    
        with allure.step("Verify pagination field types"):
            data = response.json()
            assert data["page"] is None or isinstance(data["page"], int), (
                f"'page' should be int or None, Got: {type(data['page'])}"
            )
            assert data["total_pages"] is None or isinstance(data["total_pages"], int), (
                f"'total_pages' should be int or None, Got: {type(data['total_pages'])}"
            )
>           assert data["top_per_page"] is None or isinstance(data["top_per_page"], int), (
                   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
                f"'top_per_page' should be int or None, Got: {type(data['top_per_page'])}"
            )
E           KeyError: 'top_per_page'
